headline.value: The private studio is within the monthly rent budget, but it is unfurnished, requires good credit, and requires a 12-month lease—three important mismatches with the student's stated needs and profile. Three published photos are also byte-identical to photos for Haste St #27, so those images may not show this exact unit.
headline.whyItMatters: The student needs furniture on arrival, has no U.S. credit, and prioritizes a program-aligned lease. Reused photos also make it harder to verify the unit's actual condition before applying.

summary.value: Critical qualification mismatch: the listing requires good credit and a credit check for every resident over 18, while the student has no U.S. credit, SSN, U.S. income, or U.S. guarantor. No alternative qualification route is published.
summary.whyItMatters: The listing's stated credit rule may prevent approval, and the supplied record gives no basis for assuming that parent funding, bank statements, or a sponsor letter will be accepted instead.

draftEmail.subject: Questions before applying for 2322 Haste St. #15
draftEmail.body:
Hello Ken,

I am an incoming UC Berkeley graduate student interested in studio #15. Before I apply, could you please confirm whether you consider applicants who have no U.S. credit, SSN, U.S. income, or U.S. guarantor? I am parent-funded and can provide bank statements, a sponsor letter, and enrollment evidence, but I do not want to assume those documents satisfy the good-credit requirement.

Please also confirm whether the $45 application fee is per applicant; the exact lease start and end dates; utility responsibilities; and the subletting, early-termination, and renewal rules. Because three photos appear identical to photos used for unit #27, could you provide new unit-specific photos or a live video tour clearly showing #15? I also need to know whether any furniture can be provided and what renters' insurance coverage is required.

Thank you.

draftEmail.subject: Correction and verification required for 2322 Haste St. #27
draftEmail.body:
Hello,

I am interested in 2322 Haste St. #27, but I will not make any payment while the listing's move-in block says, 'Move-in Cost: (studio #7, Max. 2 people).' Please provide corrected written terms specifically identifying unit #27 and stating its security deposit, move-in total, occupancy limit, and all required fees.

I am an incoming UC Berkeley graduate student with no U.S. credit, SSN, U.S. income, or U.S. guarantor. I am parent-funded and can provide bank statements and a sponsor letter. Please confirm in writing whether that route is accepted under the good-credit requirement before I apply.

Three photos also appear identical to photos used for unit #15. Please provide new unit-specific photos or a live video tour clearly identifying #27. I would also like confirmation of the furnished status, utility responsibilities, exact lease dates, exit rules, and renters' insurance requirement.

Thank you.

draftEmail.subject: Full terms requested for the studio at 2150 Oxford St.
draftEmail.body:
Hello Oxford Hall Properties,

I am an incoming UC Berkeley graduate student interested in the advertised studio at 2150 Oxford St. Before applying, could you provide a written cost sheet showing the security deposit, application fee, all required move-in payments, and the complete move-in total?

Please also provide the lease length, exact start and end dates, and the subletting, early-termination, and renewal rules. I have no U.S. credit, SSN, U.S. income, or U.S. guarantor and am parent-funded. Do you accept parent bank statements and a sponsor letter, and what documents would be required?

Finally, please confirm whether the studio is furnished, list the included furniture and appliances, itemize the included utilities, and provide the square footage plus a live or recorded tour of the exact unit.

Thank you.
